imports.description: Import rules for Hareru UI packages
rules: Import all components from '@hareru/ui' — no subpath imports exist
Never import from '@base-ui-components/*' directly — use Hareru wrappers

styling.description: CSS styling rules when using Hareru UI
rules: Use CSS variables (var(--hui-*)) for all style values — never hardcode
Add custom styles via className prop + CSS file
Do not use Tailwind utilities to duplicate token values
Use useTheme() hook for theme switching
Dark theme overrides color and shadow tokens only — spacing, font, radius are shared
Wrap app root with ThemeProvider and Toaster — Toaster includes ToastProvider internally
toast() requires Toaster in the component tree

cssImports.description: CSS import patterns — choose based on your project setup
rules: Standalone: @import '@hareru/ui/styles.css' — all-in-one bundle, no separate token import needed

Portable: @import '@hareru/tokens/css' + @import '@hareru/ui/styles/components.css' — no global reset. Optionally add @hareru/ui/styles/baseline.css for minimal reset, @hareru/ui/styles/scope.css for .hui-root typography scoping
Tailwind v4: declare @layer order first, then tokens + components.layer.css. components.layer.css is pre-wrapped in @layer hui for correct cascade with Tailwind utilities
Per-component: @import '@hareru/tokens/css' + individual @hareru/ui/styles/components/{Name}.css — minimal bundle. Add animations.css if using StreamingText, ReasoningPanel, or ToolCallCard

tokenQuickReference.color: --hui-color-{name} (primary, secondary, destructive, warning, success, info, muted, accent)
